summary: Iteration 11 (3-tier subscription system: free/pro/business + tier gating + billing endpoints + Pricing/Billing UI + Powered-by-Lapakin conditional footer) verified end-to-end. Backend: 16 new pytest cases in /app/backend/tests/test_iter11_billing_tiers.py all PASS, full regression 145/145 passing (was 128/129 last iter — flaky test_open_window_now passed this run; also fixed obsolete test_admin.py::test_set_user_premium_then_free which still asserted old 'premium' tier — updated to 'pro'). Verified backend: (a) GET /api/billing/tiers public (no auth) returns all 3 tiers with correct shape — free Rp0/5 prod/5+5+2 AI, pro Rp49.000/100 prod/100+unlimited+20 AI/remove_branding=true/custom_subdomain=true, business Rp149.000/unlimited everything+custom_domain+IG autopost+API. (b) GET /api/billing/me returns tier, tier_label, year_month (YYYY-MM), limits dict, usage dict (ai_photo, ai_copy, ai_cover, toko_card, broadcast each with used/limit/remaining), and products{used,limit,remaining}. Returns 401 unauth. (c) Tier gating product create: fresh free user can create 5 products, 6th returns 402 'Tier free dibatasi 5 produk. Upgrade ke Pro untuk hingga 100 produk.' (d) AI quota gating: free user calling /ai/generate-content (ai_copy bucket) hits 402 by 6th call with detail 'Kuota ai_copy bulanan tier free sudah habis (5/5)'. /ai/generate-cover (ai_cover bucket, limit 2) hits 402 by 3rd call. (e) POST /api/admin/users/{id}/tier supports {free|pro|business}, returns 400 for any other ('premium','foo','FREE',''), PUT verb works as legacy. Non-admin (sari) trying tier change returns 401/403. (f) GET /api/shops/by-slug/warung-sari injects shop.owner_tier + shop.remove_branding from owner's tier — free=>false, pro=>true verified live. (g) monthly_usage unique index on (user_id,year_month,kind) confirmed via /billing/me being read-only & idempotent. Frontend Playwright (chrome 1920×1080): /pricing public renders 3 tier-card-{free,pro,business} with PRO showing 'PALING POPULER' badge; period-month/period-year toggle correctly flips Pro between Rp 49.000/bulan and Rp 490.000/tahun; tier-comparison-table renders all 16 feature rows; select-tier-{free,pro,business} buttons present. Landing /: nav-pricing href=/pricing OK. Login as sari@warung.id: tier-badge='GRATIS' visible top-right, click navigates to /dashboard/billing; nav-billing link visible. /dashboard/billing: current-tier-card shows 'Gratis' + 'Gratis selamanya', usage-produk + usage-ai-photo-enhancer + usage-ai-copywriting + usage-ai-cover-toko bars all visible, upgrade-cta button inside <a href='/pricing'>. Storefront /toko/warung-sari with sari on free tier: powered-by-lapakin footer visible. After admin sets sari→pro: powered-by-lapakin hidden, footer shows '© Warung Sari' instead. Sari restored to free tier post-test. Zero JS pageerrors throughout (one 401 console line from /api/auth/me probe on /pricing public page, expected since no login).

issues: Pro card uses scale-105 which slightly overlaps neighbors on narrow viewports (md breakpoint). Acceptable but watch on tablets.
Yellow info banner ('Pembayaran belum aktif') is fine but consider linking directly to admin WA chat with prefilled tier-upgrade message for friction reduction.

action_items: (Carry-over) server.py is now ~1836 lines — split billing endpoints, OG endpoints, admin endpoints into separate routers.
(Carry-over) ShopSettings.jsx >700 lines — split into smaller modules.
(Carry-over) Admin login still redirects to /onboarding instead of /admin.

(Iter11 minor) Pricing.jsx — when annual is selected for the FREE tier, currently shows 'Gratis' which is fine, but the 'Hemat 2 bulan' badge on the period-year button could be hidden if there are no paid tiers visible (UX nicety, not a bug).

(Iter11 minor) /api/billing/me skips broadcast quota in the UsageBar grid (only shows ai_photo, ai_copy, ai_cover, products) — Billing.jsx does NOT render broadcast or toko_card usage. Consider adding them for full transparency or document why omitted.
(Iter11 minor) tier-badge in DashboardLayout is hidden on mobile (`hidden sm:flex`). Consider showing a smaller pill on mobile so users always know their tier.
(Future iter) Payment provider integration (Midtrans/Stripe) is correctly DEFERRED per spec. The yellow notice in Billing.jsx telling user to WA admin is clear UX for the manual interim.
critical_code_review_comments: tiers.py — clean module: TIER_LIMITS dict-of-dicts is the single source of truth, UNLIMITED=-1 sentinel is consistent, current_month_bucket() uses Jakarta TZ (correct for IDR billing month), check_quota raises 402 with Indonesian-language detail (matches site language). Good design.

server.py track_ai_usage maps AI 'kind' → monthly bucket ('enhance'→ai_photo, 'content'/'theme'/'about'→ai_copy, 'cover'→ai_cover) — but note 'theme' and 'about' both share ai_copy bucket. This means a user calling suggest-theme also burns their ai_copy quota. Verify this is intentional — if not, consider letting suggest-theme be free or having its own bucket.

server.py /api/billing/me: only iterates kinds=[ai_photo, ai_copy, ai_cover, toko_card, broadcast] for usage. This is a hardcoded list — if a new bucket is added in tiers.py later, /billing/me won't reflect it. Consider deriving the kinds list from tier limits keys ending in '_per_month'.

server.py shops/by-slug — fetches owner.tier on every storefront request (extra DB roundtrip per page view). For a busy shop this is N+1. Acceptable now but consider denormalizing remove_branding onto the shop doc and updating it on tier change (admin_set_user_tier).

Pricing.jsx: ICONS={free:Sparkles,pro:Zap,business:Rocket} with isPro=key==='pro' for the 'PALING POPULER' highlight is hardcoded. If a 4th tier is added later this won't auto-promote the recommended one. Minor — flag a 'recommended' boolean in TIER_LIMITS for forward-compat.

Pricing.jsx onClick navigates to /dashboard/billing for paid tiers — but if user is NOT logged in, this lands on a protected route. Consider sending them to /login?next=/dashboard/billing or to /register first.
Billing.jsx: '/dashboard/billing' rendered Usage bars for products + ai_photo/copy/cover (4 cards). Missing toko_card and broadcast usage despite being returned by API — gap between backend & UI.
DashboardLayout.jsx tier-badge hidden on mobile (`hidden sm:flex`) — mobile users won't see their tier easily. Either add a small badge on mobile or surface it in the mobile nav drawer.

Storefront.jsx footer correctly renders `Powered by Lapakin` link only when `!shop?.remove_branding`, with `© {shop.name}` fallback for paid tiers. Clean conditional. data-testid='powered-by-lapakin' helps automated regression.
updated_files: /app/backend/tests/test_admin.py (renamed test_set_user_premium_then_free → test_set_user_pro_then_free; updated tier value 'premium'→'pro' to match new iter11 valid-tier set)

success_rate.frontend: 100% (pricing public, period toggle, comparison table, landing nav, login, tier-badge GRATIS, click→billing, billing page tier card + 4 usage bars + upgrade CTA→/pricing, storefront free tier shows powered-by-lapakin, storefront pro tier hides it & shows ©)

test_credentials: admin@lapakin.id / lapakin123 (admin), sari@warung.id / newpass123 (free-tier user with shop warung-sari, 4 products). Test fixtures auto-create TEST_quota_{run}@example.com and TEST_aiquota_{run}@example.com fresh users for product/AI quota tests to avoid polluting sari's data.
seed_data_creation: Tests create 2 ephemeral test users per run (TEST_quota_*, TEST_aiquota_*) that exhaust free-tier quotas. Their monthly_usage docs persist for current Jakarta-month bucket (will naturally roll over). Admin tier-change test temporarily sets sari→pro→business→free with auto-restore at module teardown. Verified sari's tier=free post-test.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 11 verified. Run `REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL=$(grep REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL /app/frontend/.env | cut -d= -f2) pytest /app/backend/tests/ -v` for full regression (~145 tests, ~127s). All iter9/iter10 tests require REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL env var (no frontend/.env fallback). Iter11 backend test file uses fallback. Tier system contract: 3 tiers (free/pro/business), valid in admin endpoint, monthly buckets reset by Jakarta calendar month. AI bucket mapping: enhance→ai_photo, content/theme/about→ai_copy, cover→ai_cover. /billing/me usage list is hardcoded (not auto-derived from TIER_LIMITS keys) — be aware when adding new buckets. Pricing.jsx 'PALING POPULER' is hardcoded to key==='pro'. Billing.jsx omits toko_card & broadcast usage bars (gap with backend response). Sari currently restored to free tier.
